title: profile.v1
description: A derived track record over an agent's work history, pinned to the Merkle checkpoint it was computed at. Every number is a deterministic aggregation over the log's first tree_size leaves, so any verifier holding the log recomputes the same numbers: match and the profile grades `checked`; mismatch and it is provably false. Reputation pinned to a root is falsifiable; reputation that floats is marketing. See docs/specs/work-history.md slice 3.

checkpoint_index.description: Index of the checkpoint the aggregation was computed at.

checkpoint_tree_size.description: The log prefix length (leaves) the aggregation covers. Recomputation MUST use exactly this prefix.

checkpoint_root.description: The pinned Merkle root (sha256:<hex>). A verifier whose log prefix does not reproduce this root cannot grade the profile.

computed_at.description: RFC 3339 time the profile was computed. Informational; not part of the recomputable aggregate.

sessions_total.description: session.v1 records for this agent within the pinned prefix.

actions_total.description: Sum of the sessions' action_count fields.

approvals_total.description: Sum of the sessions' approval_count fields (each backed by a signed grant in its package).

tools_exercised.description: Sorted distinct union of the sessions' tools_exercised lists.

span_first.description: closed_at of the earliest session in the prefix.

span_last.description: closed_at of the latest session in the prefix.
